name: Deutsche Telekom IoT
description: The company provides secure and efficient IoT connectivity solutions, supporting various communication standards such as NB-IoT, LTE-M, 2G, 4G, and 5G. Their offerings include certified devices for seamless integration in IoT projects and cost-effective dormant connectivity options.

name: IoTM Solutions Ltd.
description: IoTM Solutions is a prominent provider of IoT connectivity management solutions, featuring their Federated Connectivity Management product that integrates with over 100 Mobile Network Operators, offering advanced SIM management and operational consistency. With a focus on analytics-driven services, IoTM enables enterprises to efficiently manage both legacy and future SIM deployments, enhancing connectivity reliability and reducing operational costs.

name: Three Ireland
description: Three is a leading telecommunications provider in Ireland that offers extensive Internet of Things (IoT) services, including a centralized portal for managing IoT devices and a robust network with over 85% 5G coverage. Their 3IoT Starter Kit enables users to easily explore IoT technology, while their experienced IoT team ensures service quality and security throughout the deployment process.

name: M2M Connectivity a Sierra Wireless Company
description: M2M Connectivity specializes in IoT communication solutions, offering a wide range of IoT modules that enable seamless, always-on connectivity for various applications. Their modules are designed for durability and long-life use in challenging environments, supporting technologies such as 4G, 5G, and LPWAN to meet diverse connectivity needs.

name: Sierra Wireless
description: Sierra Wireless is a key player in IoT connectivity, offering a comprehensive range of solutions including managed IoT connectivity, secure embedded modules, and advanced router solutions that support 4G, 5G, and LPWA networks. With nearly 30 years of experience and a robust portfolio, they ensure critical assets are always connected, facilitating real-time data access and enhanced operational capabilities for businesses.

name: Connectivity Factory
description: Connectivity Factory is a service provider that emphasizes its extensive connectivity offerings, particularly in IoT solutions. The company partners with leading telecom operators to enhance its portfolio, making it a valuable resource for businesses seeking to implement IoT connectivity.

name: iotcreators.com
description: The company specializes in innovative telecommunications solutions for the Internet of Things (IoT), offering a variety of protocols like NB-IoT, LTE-M, and LoRaWAN for efficient data delivery via webhooks. They focus on supporting IoT developers with seamless integration and real-time data access, simplifying the process of managing and accessing device data.

name: Secure IoT Services
description: The company specializes in IoT services, particularly in M2M connectivity and data connectivity solutions, offering unique public IP assignments for secure and reliable IoT connections. Their platform ensures high-speed data transfer and proactive management of data usage, making it a strong choice for clients seeking efficient IoT connectivity.

name: Tata Communications
description: Tata Communications provides comprehensive IoT connectivity solutions through its MOVE™ platform, enabling seamless and efficient long-range data transmission for various applications across sectors like automotive, aviation, supply chain, and industrial automation. Their network-independent approach ensures reliable global coverage, allowing businesses to focus on their IoT projects while enhancing operational efficiencies.

name: Cibicom
description: Cibicom A/S operates a nationwide LoRaWAN IoT network that facilitates wireless data collection from sensors, providing valuable analytics for various applications, including Smart City initiatives, Industry 4.0, and utilities. Their robust infrastructure ensures reliable connectivity, enabling businesses and communities to optimize processes and enhance service delivery through innovative IoT solutions.
